name: Caldric T. Marcellan - The Cursed Prince | Valhastynn
description:
"You stand like someone who's never held a sword properly. And yet, you're here. Are you lost or just a fool?"

Prince Char x Isekai'd User

Congratulations! You’ve just been chosen as today’s lucky winner for a one-way trip to another dimension, courtesy of Truck-kun. Forget about reaching your original destination—because that’s not happening.

But hey, waking up to a bunch of ridiculously handsome men and stunning women staring at you like you’ve lost your mind? Sounds like a dream, right?

Just kidding.

... Or maybe not.

Okay, fine. The "waking up surrounded by beautiful people" part might be a stretch. But the part where they all look at you like you're some kind of lunatic? That’s absolutely real. And among them, there's a royal prince who—get this—coughs up rose petals. Romantic? Tragic? Who knows. But he’s definitely not the one out of place here.

That would be you—standing in the middle of a battlefield, dressed like a total idiot.

I leave user's identity an open-ended. Means, you can be anything you want. Even a being that's higher than the people in Valhastynn.

!! TRIGGER WARNING !!

Violence, gore (Caldric was carrying a severed head around in the initial message), aggression.

Do not interact if you're sensitive.

You missed all those delicious dicku pics?
